requirement_topic.en: AZSTAND Import Conformity Regime for Lithium Batteries and Power Banks
requirement_topic.zh: AZSTAND下锂电池与移动电源进口合规要求
requirement_topic.zht: AZSTAND下鋰電池與行動電源進口合規要求

summary.en: AZSTAND is the mandatory conformity framework for regulated import products in Azerbaijan. Where lithium batteries and power banks are within scope, market entry requires compliance documentation against the applicable national standard route, which may reference AZS adoptions of IEC and GOST text, and customs release is tied to import-side verification before distribution in country. Imported products typically require in-country importer coordination at the port of entry in Baku for market entry checks and any post-clearance surveillance steps.
summary.zh: AZSTAND是阿塞拜疆有监管义务产品的强制性进口合规框架。锂电池和移动电源在落入适用范围时，入市须按相关国家标准途径出具符合性文件，相关要求可引用AZS对IEC及GOST文本的采用，清关及放行通常与进口方协同完成，并在入境后按要求接受后续核验。入境口岸（如巴库）需与境内进口方完成相关进口核准动作。
summary.zht: AZSTAND是阿塞拜疆有監管義務產品的強制性進口合規框架。鋰電池與行動電源在落入適用範圍時，入市須按相關國家標準途徑出具符合性文件，相關要求可引用AZS對IEC及GOST文本的採用，清關及放行通常與進口方協同完成，並在入境後按要求接受後續核驗。入境口岸（如巴庫）需與境內進口方完成相關進口核准動作。

standards_or_laws: AZSTAND import conformity framework and mandatory market entry procedures
AZS technical references and national adoptions of IEC and GOST standards for conformity assessment

summary.en: China baseline compliance is typically based on GB 31241 safety requirements and, where applicable, CCC certification and national customs filing. This creates domestic gatekeeping, but it is not the same process as AZSTAND import conformity in Azerbaijan, and there is no one-step import equivalence.
summary.zh: 中国的基础门槛通常是GB 31241安全要求、适用时CCC认证和国内报关申报，属于国内层面的准入管理，不等同于阿塞拜疆AZSTAND进口合规流程，不能一键等效替代。
summary.zht: 中國的基礎門檻通常是GB 31241安全要求、適用時CCC認證和國內報關申報，屬於國內層面的准入管理，不等同於阿塞拜疆AZSTAND進口合規流程，不能一鍵等效替代。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241 — safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment
CNCA CCC certification (where applicable) and GACC customs declaration requirements

gap.en: The target-market process is importer-led and regulation-specific, while China documents stop at domestic safety or certification. Chinese outputs may provide test evidence, but they do not complete AZSTAND entry or in-country compliance filing in Azerbaijan.
gap.zh: 目标市场要求以本地进口方为主并具监管定制化流程，而中国文件主要体现国内安全或认证结果。中国文件可作为试验证据，但不能替代阿塞拜疆AZSTAND入境许可或本地合规申报。
gap.zht: 目標市場要求以本地進口方為主並具監管定制化流程，而中國文件主要體現國內安全或認證結果。中國文件可作為試驗證據，但不能替代阿塞拜疆AZSTAND入境許可或本地合規申報。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for regulated products in scope, where AZSTAND import conformity and in-country coordination is required before market entry.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for products falling under CN domestic catalogues (GB 31241 baseline, CCC where applicable), but not equivalent in scope to Azerbaijan import procedures.

source.publisher: AZSTAND, Azerbaijan State Standardization, Metrology and Patents Service

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB 31241 and CCC documentation is useful but does not complete Azerbaijan AZSTAND import conformity flow. Exporters should plan for Azerbaijan-specific conformity pathways, local importer alignment, and in-country file completion prior to Baku entry.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB 31241和CCC文件可作为有用支撑，但不能单独完成阿塞拜疆AZSTAND进口合规。出口商应提前规划阿塞拜疆特定的符合性路径、与本地进口方对接并在巴库入境前完成本地文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB 31241和CCC文件可作為有用支撐，但不能單獨完成阿塞拜疆AZSTAND進口合規。出口商應提前規劃阿塞拜疆特定的符合性路徑、與本地進口方對接並在巴庫入境前完成本地文件。
